does_not_belong_here: Long prose explanations or raw unreviewed captures.
public_user_notes: Use this folder when you want the latest structured reference data.

belongs_here: Readable explanations, scope, workflow, and release guidance.
does_not_belong_here: Canonical tabular data that should be sorted or filtered.
public_user_notes: Start here if you are learning how the project works.

examples: raw app export; pasted endpoint response sample

belongs_here: Cleaned observations with classification and reviewer notes.
does_not_belong_here: Unreviewed dumps or confirmed release records.

belongs_here: Observations confirmed by retest, cross-check, or maintainer review.

belongs_here: Small optional utilities that support the reference project.
does_not_belong_here: Required app code or proprietary integrations.
public_user_notes: Scripts should be understandable and optional.
